title: MGN 533 (M) Amendment 2 means of access
body: "This notice should be read in conjunction with the merchant shipping and fishing vessels (health and safety at work) regulations 1997 (S.I 1997/2962) and Code of Safe Working Practices for Merchant Seafarers (COSWP) and replaces MGN 533 (M) amendment 1.  Amendment 2 updates references and industry best practice in carrying out risk assessments.  Notice to   shipowners operators and managers other employers of seafarers masters officers and seafarers  "

taxons.title: Safe and compliant operation of vessels
